queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical studies analyze the determinants of credit default probability associated with borrowers lacking a checking account.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Academic research evaluates the impact of negative checking account balances on credit risk drivers and their role in reducing default likelihood.
Scholarly analysis examines the statistical impact of loan duration as a credit risk driver and its mitigating effect on borrower default probability.
